tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"dig @203.0.113.1 -p 8853 test.example.com +time=1 +tries=1; echo EXIT:$?; dig @192.168.1.1 test.example.com +time=1 +tries=1; echo EXIT2:$?; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1; echo WGET:$?"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
nft insert rule inet dns_guard output udp dportt 53 ip daddr 192.168.1.1 accept; nft insert rule inet dns_guard output tcp dportt 53 ip daddr 192.168.1.1 accept; nft insert rule inet dns_guard output udp dportt 8853 ip daddr 192.168.1.1 accept; nft insert rule inet dns_guard output tcp dpoort 8853 ip daddr 192.168.1.1 accept; nft list ruleset
table inet dns_guard {
 chain output {
  type filter hook output priority filter; policy accept;
  tcp dport 8853 ip daddr 192.168.1.1 accept
  udp dport 8853 ip daddr 192.168.1.1 accept
  tcp dport 53 ip daddr 192.168.1.1 accept
  udp dport 53 ip daddr 192.168.1.1 accept
  udp dport 53 ip daddr 192.168.1.1 accept
  tcp dport 53 ip daddr 192.168.1.1 accept
  udp dport 8853 ip daddr 192.168.1.1 accept
  tcp dport 8853 ip daddr 192.168.1.1 accept
  udp dport 53 drop
  tcp dport 53 drop
  udp dport 8853 drop
  tcp dport 8853 drop
 }
}
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
